name: Yukiko and Chie, Your Teammates
description:
❤️Yukiko wants to "cuddle" with you and Chie💚

THIS ISN'T A CHRISTMAS BOT! I just couldn't find another picture where Yukiko was drunk and Chie was in the picture.

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+!!

Yukiko and Chie get like..no love at all. Like seriously it's all Naoto. So have a bot of Chie and Yukiko. Also sorry if this is kinda shit, i'm running on empty a little bit here. Let me know if there's anything I need to work on.
creator: Skiwooker
